title: Rapid PvP
description:
An awesome 1.8.9 resource pack for PvP.
A Blue PvP Texture Pack.
body:
# 📜 Description
Rapid PvP is a Minecraft texture pack which makes 1.8.9 PvP more enjoyable.
It is a bright blue-themed resource pack that focuses on improving the look of the game for Bedwars, Skywars and Skyblock.

If you liked this resource pack, please check out [Average Swords™](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/average-swords) for more average sized weapons!


# 🎨 Preview
![Preview Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ukakElUO/images/2b294a382fe5cc707792fbd7e222184de99a7445.png)

# 💾 Installation Guide
You do not need Optifine or Sodium to use this resource pack. Simply download the .zip and drag it into your minecraft texture packs folder: `C:\Users\<USERNAME>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks`

# 🔗 Links
